entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps Application Backend not working at all.
entry.content: I also got the message with some VCF project I was trying to see the data for. But I removed the roles and users and redeployed, and then I could see the data. I would check the permissions, roles and users, and also make sure you have deployed the changed roles and saved the changed users.

entry.title: Fiori data source how to view
entry.content:
HI Expert: 

Pls advise how to view the data in data source in Fiori pls?

 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: SAP RAP: Hiding Actions
entry.content:
Hello Community,

Is it possible to hide actions completely instead of just deactivating them?

In my use case, a user should not even see the actions if he does not have the required role.

In my case, I have an inline action:

@ui.lineItem: [
    {
      type:#FOR_ACTION,
      label: 'Edit request',
      dataAction: 'edit request',
      inline: true,
      emphasized: true,
      importance: #HIGH,
      position: 100,
      hidden: #( VisibilityAction )
    }
  ]

 If I use hidden: true it works and the action is hidden. But with a virtual element and hidden: #( VisibilityAction ) it does not work.

Maybe someone here knows more

regards,

Lars

entry.title: Re: Response Key Path is missing
entry.content:
You do that with the response mapper. Inside the mapper there is an object that sets the response and status code. For response, the default is:

response.data

This returns the full response. Just add your path to this.

entry.title: Re: How do we identify Create/Update/Delete actions in RA...
entry.content:
@Pradeep_Reddy 

I would select from the base CDS view to check whether the record already exists in the DB. If it does, you can say that current action is an update.

entry.title: Re: Dynamic restricted key figure in analytic model
entry.content:
Hello Shlomi,

today I saw this Influence Request was set to "Delivered":

https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#idea/302400 

Obviously Customer Exit Variables do exist now? 🤔 Or when ever Q1 release will be delivered.

BR, Martin

entry.title: Re: Flexible Programming Model - Disable Column Resizing...
entry.content:
@axel_brke3 i do not think this will break easily, you can just use some form of this code from UI5.
This is the "findOn" method:

	PluginBase.getPlugin = function(oElement, vPlugin = PluginBase) {
		// Keep this function in sync with sap.m.plugins.PluginBase.getPlugin
		// until the library dependencies are cleaned up and a reuse can happen!

		if (!oElement) {
			return;
		}

		if (typeof vPlugin === "function" && vPlugin.getMetadata) {
			vPlugin = vPlugin.getMetadata().getName();
		}

		const fnCheck = function(oElem) {
			/* TBD Cleanup sap.m and sap.ui.table plugins should be aligned in future.*/
			return oElem.isA(vPlugin) && (
					oElem.isA(["sap.m.plugins.PluginBase", "sap.ui.table.plugins.PluginBase"]));
		};

		return oElement.getDependents().find(fnCheck) || oElement.findElements(false, fnCheck)[0];
	};

can anybody answer what I should do with not used/needed freight units in SAP Transportation Management  ?

This for the background that my customer has an FUBR which cannot suspend unwanted deliveries.

Thanks for answers!

Peter

entry.title: Re: SAP RAP: Hiding Actions
entry.content:
@lars_kr 

One option is to create an App Variant using UI adaptation and hide the button. You can then assign the variant app to a specific role.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-fiori-for-sap-s-4hana-app-variants-are-the-easy-way-to-control-app/ba-p/13557917

entry.title: GLOBAL_COUNTER 000001
entry.content: when migo 541 po GLOBAL_COUNTER 000001

entry.title: Return Delivery of Subcontracting including Components
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

I would like to create a return delivery for a subcontract order including the end product and the components. I use MIGO - Return Delivery - Material Document and check the Via Delivery box. The outbound return delivery that is created only contains the end product but not the components. After the goods issue posting, the components also do not appear again in the LB stock.

If I make the same posting without ticking the Via Delivery box, the system posts the components back to the LB stock. -> Is there a way to do this for the outbound delivery as well?

The movement types are the same in both cases. (122 for end product and 544 for components)

Thank you for your support!

entry.title: Re: LINK TO WEBGUI IN TUTORIAL IS NOT WORKING ANYMORE?

entry.title: Re: CREDIT NOTE DUE DATE - SAP PUBLIC CLOUD EDITION
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you very much for your question.

Can you please check whether the following knowledge base article (KBA) answers your question?

Henrike

entry.title: Re: Build Your Own Cash Sales Application with SAP Build Leveraging SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility
entry.content:
@Feng_Chen 

Thanks for interest on this template! There are some potential reasons to cause the issue. Here is a general check list if you can provide to us to further analyze the root cause:

1. Open your Configure Default Setting App project, go to "Integrations" and find "Visual cloud functions":

open GeneralGlobalSetting and click on Browse Real Data. Check if you can see any existing entry or whether you are able to successfully add an entry into it.

2. When you try to update default settings in the preview mode, before you trigger the field change, open browser developer tool and go to Network, then trigger the change and find the failed request.

entry.title: Sales Order Status Remains In Process Instead of Completed.
entry.content:
The customer has successfully completed the sales order, from outbound delivery to invoicing.
However, the status of the sales order still remains marked as "in process."


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Sales Order Status Remains In Process Instead of Comp...
entry.content:
Dear requester,

In the sales order item line, when the delivered quantity is less than the requested quantity, the line remains In Process on delivery status.

If you do not want to further deliver the remaining quantity of the order line, you need to set a 'reason for rejection' to cancel the remaining open quantity.

Once all the lines are finished (cancelled), the order will be completed status.

See details in KBA:  1755905 - You are not able to Cancel a Sales Order.

 

Thanks,

Adie

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – New options for managing Views for filters tables and charts

entry.title: Re: Adding a Custom Field for technical objects in S/4HANA Cloud for Asset Management

entry.title: Re: Fiori data source how to view
entry.content:
Hi, 

run Tcode SDDLAR in GUI - and pick 'Data Preview' in CDS, then Execute, enter the name of your CDS, values for parameters, end execute again, it will display data in that CDS 🙂 

for example: 

KR 
Veronika

entry.title: Re: Fiori Element - Fragment - Uncaught TypeError
entry.content: please show the complete code, fragment.xml and javascript code

entry.title: Re: Usage of Advanced SQL Migration Tool for 6 TB of data
entry.content:
Hi Kiran,

One important thing to mention is that SAP Advanced SQL Migration tool focus in the SQL conversion for non-SAP databases data models to SAP databases, this is clearly indicated in the documents we share in official community for this migration tool (https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/advanced-sql-migration) 

I am not an expert in SAP Liquidity Management for Banking but checking the PAM I see that both Oracle and SAP Hana are supported databases and this means that we already provide the data model for Hana so the use of this tool to make the SQL covnersion is not applicable in this case. My feeling is that a high level process for you to follow is to create an instance of this solution in Hana and move the data from Oracle to Hana using any supported way/tool provided for that, for example SAP Hana SDI.

My suggestion for you is to talk to your local customer services deparment to look for colleagues with skills in this area and in this solution and they will be able to provide support to you to takle this migration accordingly.

Best Regards.

Javier Martin.

entry.title: SAC USER ID
entry.content:
Hi All,

What is the best option for USER ID in SAC?

I am planning to use the employee ID as the USER ID, but users who were created directly in IAS do not have an employee ID. Which attributes from Azure and IAS would be best to use as the USER ID in SAC?

Is the login name field in IAS always provisioned as the USER ID in SAC via IPS?

Thank you so much.

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: Fiori Element - Fragment - Uncaught TypeError
entry.content:
Fragment3.fragment.xml:

<core:FragmentDefinition xmlns:core="sap.ui.core" xmlns="sap.m" xmlns:macros="sap.fe.macros">
	<VBox core:require="{ handler: 'test/odata/test/odata/v4/ext/fragment/Fragment3'}">
		<Button text="Fragment3" press="handler.onPress" />
	</VBox>
</core:FragmentDefinition>

Frgment3.js:

sap.ui.define([
    "sap/m/MessageToast"
], function(MessageToast) {
    'use strict';

    return {
        onPress: function(oEvent) {
            MessageToast.show("Custom handler invoked.");
            _working( );
            this._not_working();
            
            
            function _working() {
                MessageToast.show("Message2");    
            }
        },
        _not_working: function( ){
            MessageToast.show("Message3");    
        }
    };
});

entry.title: Re: Joule for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition - A Comprehensive Setup Guide
entry.content: Great blog. In point 7 above. Is the FQDN the cloud connector virtual address or the real address?

entry.title: #12 - Discover Post-Live Resources
entry.content:
Post-live resources provide ongoing support and help address any issues that arise after the system is live, ensuring a smooth transition to regular operations. 

Picture 1 - Example for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

What’s New  

The What’s New Viewer is an SAP help page for each solution which allows our customers to find the deprecated, changed, and new features between your as-is and to-be SAP Solution release. This is presented in a downloadable list format that can be filtered, it provides a short description to better understand the capabilities delivered and links to technical information of the delivered innovations. 

Release Assessment and Scope Dependency Tool (SAP S/4HANA Cloud public edition, only) 

The release assessment and scope dependency is a simple, self-learning tool for the customers of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. This tool enables the ease of consumption and adoption of impacts, improvements, and innovations which are rolled out with each release and upgrade. 
 
It presents to the customers, a tailor-made list of deleted, deprecated, new and changed objects like apps, APIs  CDS views, Scope Items etc. for each SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition release and continuous delivery. This list is filtered based on the customer’ s used and activated scope which means that the customers only see the changes relevant to them and not the entire list. 

Cloud ALM for operations 

SAP Cloud ALM for Operations empowers customers to understand the health of their SAP business solutions by providing full stack monitoring and alerting covering business processes, integration, users, applications, and health of cloud services and systems. It also allows them to conduct root cause analysis on different levels and act as a collaboration platform between LOB and IT. SAP Cloud ALM enables operations automation by integrating existing automation solutions. It also introduces intelligent event processing to enable event correlation and intelligent alerting to provide transparency regarding availability of business services including event calendar and service level management. 

Continuous Quality Check for Process Adoption (for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition only) 

Continuous Quality Check (CQC) are service reports with an executive summary, findings and a detailed action plan to mitigate risks or improve system usage. As a post live resource there are CQC which according to the solution focus on improving system usage and adopting the latest innovations, business process improvement, optimization of security and performance, monitor and reduce and data volume amongst others. Find more

 Benchmark value assessment (for SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition only) 

This is a continuation from the benchmark performed at the discovery phase which output is a personalized scorecard in real-time showcasing a Key Performance Indicator analysis and process maturity gap on best practices in comparison to industry peers for all process areas contained in the solution. Find more here.

Go-Live Solution Adoption & Optimization (for SAP Fieldglass only) 

To get guidance on feature and functionality information, post-release feature adoption guidance, application best practice recommendations and product optimization/adoption, the Product Success Advisory from Fieldglass will offer guidance in a personalized way.  Find more here.

SAP Roadmap Explorer 

SAP Road Map Explorer empowers customers to easily build valuable road maps according to their unique needs update on a regular throughout the year. This is an interactive tool for effective decision making as it informs our customers on existing and upcoming innovations with detailed updates on product innovations allowing for customized filtering per product. Find more here.

Influence Portal 

The SAP Continuous Influence program provides our customers and partners with the opportunity to suggest improvements on SAP products directly to the development teams. This program is specifically aimed towards customers with productive licenses for SAP products and who would like to be able to suggest improvements in a continuously open channel. In addition, our customers can also find initiatives where SAP is looking for early adopters of certain functionalities for testing which grants early access and enhanced support for early testers. 

See more and understand how to influence and get influenced from SAP https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/influence-adopt 

Having questions, comments or feedbacks? Don't hesitate to comment down below or contact 

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Check out other blogs from the series: Customer Onboarding at SAP.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

About the author:

Daniel is Experience Owner for GROW with SAP at customer onboarding at SAP, bringing a decade of experience in customer management roles in a diverse set of industries and customer sizes. He possesses deep expertise in processes underlying the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition since the start of its commercialization. His strategic approach ensures customers effectively speed up time to value for their GROW with SAP subscriptions.

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: Connection Rejected Error in CAP
entry.content:

I started the server using the command cds watch and when I try to click send request in the .http file shown here getting the marked error.

entry.title: How to Assign Ressource to the Project
entry.content:
Hello PS Experts, 

I want to assign some projects to my resource ID but I didn't find where to do that in Fiori Apps. 

Could you please share with me the procedure so I can assign resource to projects and then book a time on it on he TimeSheet. 

Thanks. 

#SAP Portfolio and Project Management

entry.title: Re: Flexible Programming Model - Disable Column Resizing...
entry.content:
I solved this on 108 using

 
var oTable = this.getView().byId("rwws.eh.feprototype.owbfe::ScaleReceiptSetMain--LineItemTable-content");
oTable.setEnableColumnResize(false);
 
I am not very happy with this approach

For later versions, Marian's response should be applied as it's a more elegant approach

entry.title: Re: Automatic Purchase Requisition from Manual Reservation
entry.content: A reservation creates a requirement. If the requirement can't be covered by stock, MRP planning will generate a procurement proposal. The requirement and the procurement proposal are linked with requirements pegging in case of anonymous stock or with a special stock number.

entry.title: Re: "Cannot Analyze Certificate" Error While Importing .p...
entry.content:
Hi Hemachandiran,

Check this SAP note 2524629 

Regards

SS

entry.title: Re: CDS views of equipment types & groups in public cloud
entry.content: Hi Sumit807, Unfortunately we dont have API available and hence I would recommend to create the CIP as mentioned above so that it can be consider in product roadmap. Thanks and regards,Amita

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Credit Management - New Information Category 50
entry.content:
Dear rcpmahinay1990,

I am really sorry for not noticing your question for a long time.

Yes, you can add an information category under IMG: Financial Supply Chain Management > Credit Management > Credit Risk Monitoring > Credit Limit Check > Define Info Categories.
However, it does not work only by adding a new information category. You will get an error FS_BP_ADDITIONS011 (Information type xx does not belong to the information category) when you use this new one at transaction UKM_BP.
You can try the solution provided on SAP Note 2183870 - UKM_BP: 'Additional Information' not stored correctly or your receive an error message while trying to store the data.

For the second question, seems like you can maintain several lines with different durations. I cannot test them right now, because the check is based on system date. You can check how it works at your side, too 🙂

Hope this information helps.
Best regards.

entry.title: Re: Material Standard Cost Estimate (CO-PC-PCP)
entry.content: Insightful. Thanks for sharing !

entry.title: Migration Cockpit: Archived migrated data should be migrated again.
entry.content:
Scenario:
Migration using Migration Cockpit (with staging tables) into an existing, productive S/4HANA system.

Problem:
The customer wants to use archiving as a kind of fallback scenario. If the data quality of the already migrated data is not sufficient, it should be possible to delete it from the system using archiving function (SARA).
Once the source data has been corrected, it should be reloaded into the system using the Migration Cockpit.
What options do we have here?

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to detect MRP failure? Also, is there...
entry.content:
こんにちは@Dave_He

あなたの素晴らしい応答をありがとう!

MRPエラー発生時の操作方法がわかってきました!

entry.title: Re: Product Compliance (new): automatic substance checks not starting with mass uploaded materials
entry.content:
Dear Paulo,

I´s suggest you do some that might help with your issue:

1. Check Job Scheduling via SE38:
- Ensure that the background jobs responsible for the automatic substance checks are scheduled and running as expected. Sometimes, these jobs may not be activated or might be encountering errors

Here's an example of how you could proceed with checking the job scheduling:

- Run Transaction SE38
- Enter the program name related to the substance checks (assume RCSBATCH for Recipe Composition)
- Execute the program and check if it runs without errors, in case of errors occur note and address them

2. Review Configuration Settings for EU REACH SVHC Status (just in case)

3. Verify Data Completeness (that all necessary data fields are correctly populated, just in case)

4. Check the data upload. The sequence you mentioned seems correct, but it might be worth ensuring that each step is fully completed and successfully saved before moving to the next one (it is obvious but just in case)

5. Try to simulate the substance checks manually. I mean using relevant transaction codes and reports to manually trigger the substance checks for a few materials to see if the issue is with the mass upload process or the system's ability to perform the checks

6. Check the system logs and error messages (I am sure you did, but just in case)

7. If the above steps will not resolve the issue, please reach out to SAP Support - since the problem might lay deeper


Best regards,

Sergey

entry.title: National ID masking for visibility for employees
entry.content:
in India as per the regularizes we have to mask the nation id 1.

aadhar card let us know the feasibility of the same.

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements - ID as Numeric Value, comata displayed

entry.title: How to Manage Multiple Delivery Points from a Single Sales Order in SAP?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am a beginner in SAP and need some assistance. I have a single sales order that contains multiple line items. I need to manage multiple delivery points at the logistics level from this single order. When I create a sales order, I don't see where I can specify multiple shipping points. Could someone please explain the procedure to me? Additionally, I need to ensure that there is only one invoice for this order.

Thank you for your help!

entry.title: SAP Business Data Cloud reference is present in S/4HANA transaction RDBMON
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I found that a Business Data Cloud reference is present inside SAP S/4HANA 2021 756.

I compare a similar system without the notes installed with CNV_NOTE_ANALYZER_DI, and here the reference to BDC are not present.

My question is: 

- given the latest notes installed for Replication flows, that as you see in the image lead to use "Consumer type = APE), abap pipeline engine,

- given the fact that in troubleshooting guide for replication flow the listed mechanism is RMS + APE.

- given the fact that we spot a "BDC" entry in Consumer type.

Do we need to expect a change in the mechanism used by Datasphere / Business Data Cloud to extract data?
Do someone experience in their systems the usage of Consumer type BDC?
What changes from APE to BDC consumer type? is there some documentation?

Best Regards,

Alberto

entry.title: Re: BW Bridge: DTP Filter doesn't fetch any records but t...
entry.content:
Does the data reach your expert routine? Do you see data in INTAB in the AMDP debugger?

Are you using a static filter in the DTP or a filter routine? Is the filter routine producing the expected filter criteria? If you are using a filter routine, have you tried with a static filter?

@Sandra_Rossi

entry.title: Re: Flexible Programming Model - Disable Column Resizing...
entry.content:
please edit to not use "sap.ui.getCore" and more like "this.base.getView()" or something like that. "sap.ui.getCore" will be deprecated in UI5 2.0. But this is also a valiid approach, i do think this will work for a long time

i just used it because i executed it in the console and not in code

entry.title: Re: BW 7.5 upgrade with S/4 upgrade. Use of ODP to source...
entry.content:
Hi Ratish

 

CDS views can be consumed by BW via ODP:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_NETWEAVER_750/ccc9cdbdc6cd4eceaf1e5485b1bf8f4b/af11a5cb6d2e4d4f90d344f58fa0fb1d.html?locale=en-US

 

br

Roland

entry.title: Does SAP Datasphere support connecting to a PostGIS database with geometry attributes?
entry.content:
I am trying to directly read (and import as a remote table) a table from a PostGIS database via JDBC connection in SAP Datasphere. This table contains geographical information stored in a column with the **Geometry** data type.

However, when I attempt to access the table, I encounter an error. I would like to know:
- Does SAP Datasphere support reading tables that include a Geometry attribute?
- Even if I do not intend to use this column, is it still a blocker for accessing the table?

Any insights or workarounds would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: SAP Global Trade Management (GTM) - Trading Contract (T/C)
entry.content:
hi Ido,

I assume, that you are speaking about the document flow within the trading contract (TA WB22, WB23) correct? Have you used the trading execution workbench (TA WTEW) to create the incoming invoice? Or just TA MIRO?

If you want, we can have a teams session and we can check in your system what the reason is. Sent me a PM if want to go this way.

Best

Peter

entry.title: Re: BW Bridge: DTP Filter doesn't fetch any records but t...
entry.content: It's a static filter on 0CALMONTH. I will attach screenshot from the DTP monitor

entry.title: Re: Product Compliance (new): automatic substance checks not starting with mass uploaded materials
entry.content:
Dear Paulo,

thanks a lot for posting your request in the Community. Unfortunately it is very difficult to perform a remote analysis without having access to the system. Therefore i would suggest the following proceeding:

  1. Check if the background processing is set-up properly, by following up on the IMG Activities and Documentation underneath the IMG Activity path "SAP Customizing Implementation Guide / Product Compliance / Foundation for Product Compliance / Product Compliance Background Processing".
  2. If PCEP (Product Compliance Event Processing) is setup properly, create a short smoke test by 
    1. Start App F2641 / Manage Basic Compliance Data for unpackaged Products
    2. Create a new Chemical Compliance Object
    3. Assign a Compliance Purpose to the product, which contains the compliance Requirements - e.g. EU REACH SVHC
    4. Maintain the Analytical composition and release the composition
    5. As a result the system should create a Compliance Assessment and either release the assessment or create an In-Progress Version
  3. If this works fine you can be sure that the background processing is setup properly and you can compile and summarize all the information in document and create SNOW case, so that the support and development team can foollow-up on it.

Please create the Case on the application component EHS-SUS-FND or EHS-SUS-PMA.

Best regards,

Kristian

entry.title: Re: Transportation Management : Not used freight units
entry.content:
Hello @Peter2408 

What do you mean by "not used/needed freight units"? If there is an open outbound delivery, it needs to be shipped sooner or later. Thus transportation needs to be planned for the delivery. If the delivery is TM relevant, TM creates freight units, which are the beginning of the planning process. 

If transportation planning is not required for a delivery, then you should be made non-TM relevant or it should be deleted / blocked if the delivery is not to be shipped at all. 

If you want to postpone TM planning, you might consider blocking the freight units.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: BW Bridge: DTP Filter doesn't fetch any records but t...
entry.content: I tried executing the DTP in Simulation, but for some reason the debugger is not active, so I can't really debug it.

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to make a JAR a global resource in CPI like a Script Collection for instance?
entry.content:
Hello Jacob,


Unfortunately not. I think I will need to ask SAP support for this possibility. On the other hand it's a bit frustrating that adding your own JARs to an IFlow causes a warning. In some situations - especially with the stuff I am working on - it's the only solution to get things done.

Regards,
Mathias

entry.title: Re: Request for Mass Upload of Journal Entries from Excel...
entry.content: I do not think promoting your product is appropriate here

entry.title: where to create new Relative DATE FUNCTION
entry.content:
Hi Expert:

I see this parameter in Fiori report.

How to create new Relative DATE FUNCTION pls? for example from 2020 until today.

CDS view is C_REQNAVGAPPROVALTIME

Pls advise

entry.title: Getting an error in SOAP UI while passing an endpoint from SAPCPI
Re: SAP S/4HANA 2021: Multiple Address Handling in Order-to-Cash Documents Using SAP Business Partne
entry.content: I think it's also important to mention in here that if you use EDI communication with your customers, this Business Functionality also adds new field into the EDPAR table - Address ID. If you for example use ORDERS IDocs, it's necessary to set this Address ID for your customers so the EDI communication is not impacted.

entry.title: SNBCH - Zahlungsbilanz Schweiz - sehr lange Laufzeit
entry.content:
Hallo Experten 

vielleicht hätte jemand Erfahrung mit der Einrichtung der Schweizer Zahlungsbilanz. Wir haben im Customizing das Externe Meldewesen eingerichtet und bekommen auch eine Ausgabe wenn wir die Transaktion SNBCH aufrufen, aber es dauert ca. 2 Stunden bis der Report das Ergebnis ausgibt. 

Folgende Einstellungen haben wir im Customizing getätigt. 

1. Einrichten ihres externen Meldewesens 

2. Meldekategorie definieren -> Hier haben wir einen Eintrag für "CAS-G" definiert. 

3. Meldeunterkategorien definieren -> Hier haben mehrere Unterkategorien definiert (5.1, 9.1, 9.2, 9.3, 9.4 etc.) 

4. Kriterien für die Zuordnung von Belegen zu Meldekategorie/-unterkategorie definieren -> Hier haben wir zur Meldekategorie CAS-G mehrere HKONT Einträge zu den Meldeunterkategorien definiert, mit fortlaufender Laufnummer. HKONT Ranges und auch einzelne Konten. 

Wenn wir nun den Report mit SNBCH aufrufen und eine Selektion mitgeben auf Belegarten, Debitoren, Kreditoren oder deren Abstimmkonten, läuft der Report im Hintergrund ca. 2 Stunden und findet 65 Einträge. 

In unserem System sind sehr viele Daten, Millionen Einzelposten, könnte es sein, dass dieser Report so lange läuft, da es sich um einen R3 Report handelt und nicht auf S4 optimiert ist? Als BKPF/BSEG auswertet anstatt ACDOCA? 

Wir können uns sonst die lange Laufzeit nicht erklären. 

Vielleicht hätte ja jemand bereits ähnliche Erfahrung oder einen Tipp, wie die Laufzeit beschleunigt werden könnte. 

Besten Dank und viele Grüsse

Thomas

entry.title: PG1 SAP Picking List For In Stock and Awaiting Parts
entry.content:
Hello,

We have recently started shipping everything directly from our own warehouse to customers which is a big step for us. But we are having problems from a partial picking stand point. 

Is it possible to create a picking list for the warehouse staff that shows the parts currently in stock and the parts currently awaiting arrival?

For instance, I create an order in VA01 with 4 part numbers. 2 in stock, 2 I have to order in. Is it possible to create a picking list for my warehouse staff that shows this picking list has 2 items they can pick now and 2 items not yet available for this order? 

They basically want the option to start picking incomplete orders to set aside while also being able to see that this order is not complete. How can we do this? When I create a picking list for orders in VA01 it only shows parts available right now, with no indication this order is waiting for parts.

entry.title: Add district to the payment slip
entry.content:
Previously, we used the "City" field in IT0006 to input district data. After upgrading from ECC to S4 HANA, we have realized that the HK address does not require the "City" field, and we would like to change this to utilize the "District" field instead.

However, we have encountered an issue: when generating the payment slip, the district data does not appear. The current configuration only displays the street, 2nd address line, city, and area. 

Could you please advise on how we can resolve this issue?

Thank you for your assistance.

entry.title: Re: Filter Value help results in Child entity based on pa...
entry.content: I use it for create, update both. I think your restriction may be because you're on odata v2.

entry.title: Re: The secret to better "looking" tasks in SAP Build Process Automation: Customizing My I
entry.content:
Hi @SadiqManji ,

I've never tried to be honest, but it should be possible to filter by the custom attributes in Task Center. Pls, let us all know, if you find out!

entry.title: ABAP News for SAP BTP ABAP Environment 2502
entry.content:
In this blog, you'll learn about the new features for SAP BTP ABAP Environment 2502 that the ABAP keyword documentation team documented.

News for ABAP Release 9.14 

ABAP CDS

Writable CDS View Entities

You can now define writable CDS view entities. Use the syntax:

… WRITABLE … VIEW ENTITY view_entity …

More about writable CDS view entities

CDS Table Entities

A new kind of CDS entity is available: the CDS table entity. CDS table entities are the successor of DDIC database tables. Use the syntax:

… DEFINE TABLE ENTITY …

More about CDS table entities

Writable CDS External Entities

You can now define writable CDS external entities. Use the syntax:

… WRITABLE … EXTERNAL ENTITY ext_entity …

More about writable CDS external entities

ABAP SQL

Connection Objects

Connection objects in ABAP SQL represent database connections and can be used by implementing the interface IF_ABAP_SQL_CONNECTION. Using the following syntax, service connections can be enabled in ABAP Cloud:

… CONNECTION @con_ref

More about connection objects

Declaring a Client Column for Client-independent Data Sources

In ABAP SQL, you can declare a column of a client-independent data source as a client column and the data source as client-dependent using the addition DECLARE CLIENT in the FROM clause. Use the following syntax:

… DECLARE CLIENT clnt_col

More about client columns for client-independent data sources

Addition OPTIONS for DML Statements

OPTIONS can be used in DML statements to introduce ABAP-specific additions. You can use the addition OPTIONS at the end of a DML statement or for a subquery of DML statements.

More about the OPTIONS addition

Addition PRIVILEGED ACCESS for DML Statements

PRIVILEGED ACCESS can be used in DML statements to disable CDS access control.

More about the PRIVILEGED ACCESS addition

AMDP

Client Safety of AMDP Methods

AMDP does not support implicit client handling. This means that client safety must be delegated to the objects accessed in AMDP methods and declared in the USING list. In client-safe AMDP methods, client-dependent DDIC database tables, client-independent DDIC database tables, and ABAP database schema objects can be accessed.

  • More about client safety of AMDP methods
  • Blog about client handling in ABAP

sXML Library

Header Options for sXML Library

The sXML Library supports header options for the XML declaration. Three different options are available:

  • CO_OPT_VAL_NO (no XML header; default)
  • CO_OPT_VAL_WITHOUT_ENCODING (version)
  • CO_OPT_VAL_WITHOUT_ENCODING (version and encoding)

More about header options for the sXML Library

ABAP EML

Runtime Type Service Method for BDEF Derived Types

Using runtime type services, you can create BDEF-derived types dynamically and type-safe.

More about Runtime type service method for BDEF derived types

Using Custom Secondary Table Keys in BDEF Derived Types

You can create custom secondary table keys for BDEF-derived types.

More about using custom secondary table keys in BDEF-derived types

If there are any questions, feel free to comment below. We hope you like the new features.

entry.title: switching source systems from DEV to QA for BW dev
entry.content:
We have trying to find the feasibility of changing the source system of BW dev system

from ECC dev system to S/4 Quality system.

BW dev system system refresh was done in 2017 from production. Data quality is poor and there has been random adhoc data loads done by users, No process chain is actively scheduled in BW dev.

Now we have been asked to decommission BW QA. We should configure source system S/4 Quality as source system to BW dev and load recent 2 years data.

We are trying to check feasibility and a plan of action. Our BW dev is 7.5 version on MS SQL database.

Our BW QA and Prod are in 7.0 version on MS SQL.

1. Won't we have to delete all present data in SAP BW dev system? Last refresh was 2017 and we want to do 2023 and 2024 full loads of data after content deletion.

Is there a way to delete all content from all infoproviders at once? Is it necessary to delete?

2. Do we have to load individual data flows Master and transaction in BW for 2023 and 2024? or is there another way for data refresh - 2 specific years? (Dev and prod/QA version are different)

Regards,

Ratish

entry.title: Preventive Support for SAP’s New Era of Customer Care
entry.content:
A few years ago, mobile phones did not have functions that nowadays we consider part of our routines such as video chat and music streaming. Today’s smartphones, moreover, have evolved to include integration of functions like camera, mobile payment and various apps. Similarly, customer care approaches have developed along with cellphones. Historically, the inability of businesses to afford real-time analysis meant that customer care was mostly reactive, dealing with issues as they arose.

In an era of real-time data, this backward-looking strategy presents a challenge companies need to overcome to understand customer behavior and boost business performance. Organizations now aim to retrieve information from past, present and future to gain a comprehensive view of their processes to forecast events and identify anomalies. Consequently, the outcomes expected will be the result of anticipated preparation and planning.

At SAP, the vast repository of historical issues, combined with extensive product knowledge and expertise, forms a rich foundation for preventive support. Some of the best practices to implement successful preventative customer care involve:

  • Using robust automation systems and AI models to process issue signals quickly.
  • Providing self-service opportunities through knowledge bases and chatbots.
  • Offering proactive support through notifications and updates.

AI and Machine Learning, alongside various data points and automation, enable us to identify patterns and issues, and to implement automated mitigation actions to prevent customers' business impact at early stages.

Furthermore, the potential of insights from critical event data as a strategic asset has expanded its use beyond traditional areas like marketing and sales. Now, departments such as customer service, finance, and operations management are also adopting this strategy. To assess the effectiveness of our customer care efforts, SAP employs several key metrics, including:

  • Customer Satisfaction Score (CSAT) and Net Promoter Score (NPS).
  • Customer Effort Score (CES) to rate how effortlessly customers were able to receive support.
  • Reduction in support calls or inquiries.
  • Production uptime and availability.

In this way, we monitor our progress while refining algorithms based on real-world feedback and performance metrics. For our customers, preventive support means an increase in reliability of their system that will lead to customer satisfaction. Additionally, they adapt to changing scenarios, therefore decision-making process will be based on real-time information.

Having successfully exercised this approach to support SAP Commerce Cloud customers during 2024 Black Friday and Cyber Monday sales events, we are at the moment expanding this model across other SAP products.

Just as smartphones have become essential through the integration of diverse functionalities, our preventive support approach seeks to be crucial in proactive customer care. As we continue to refine our AI models and expand our prognostic capabilities, we're committed to staying at the forefront of innovative solutions that keep businesses running smoothly.

At SAP Sapphire 2025, which will take place in Orlando and Madrid, we’ll hold sessions with experts to show how we support customers to better predict issues.

Check out this SAP News Center article to learn how proactive customer care can drive success during peak e-commerce sales periods.

entry.title: Adobe Connect VLS Integration in SuccessFactors LMS – Error in Registration Links
entry.content:
We are currently setting up Adobe Connect as a Virtual Learning Service (VLS) vendor in SAP SuccessFactors Learning Management System (LMS). We followed the guides and completed the integration setup successfully. When we create a class in LMS, a corresponding session is created in the Adobe Admin Console, which suggests that the integration is working as expected.

However, we are encountering an issue with the registration confirmation notifications sent to users and instructors from LMS. The links included in these notifications lead to a 404 error when clicked. Based on the format of the link, we suspect this might be related to a connector class configuration issue.

Has anyone experienced a similar issue when setting up Adobe as VLS in LMS? Are there specific configurations or steps in the connector class setup that we might have missed? Any recommendations for troubleshooting or resolving the 404 error in the registration links?

SAP SuccessFactors Learning

entry.title: Re: Extensibility for Group Reporting
entry.content:
Hi All,

Great post.

I am about to use the custom field logic app. Were you able to release the data from ACDOCA to ACDOCU for the custom field ? Your inputs will help me to proceed further. Thanks in advance. 

Regards

Vidya

entry.title: Static Factory Actions with Deep Parameters don't work
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am on S/4HANA 2023 FPS02 ON-PREM.

I am trying to setup a static factory action with deep parameters to create a popup with mandatory parameters before I create my entity. When deep parameters are used I get this short dump.  

Note the following.

01. static factory action with flat parameters work.
02. action (both static/non-static) with deep parameters work.
03. non static factory action with deep parameters work.  

As a workaround for now, I've set this up as a static action, exposed it via metadata extension and hidden the actual create action with @UI.createHidden:true.  

Hi @Andre_Fischer . Would appreciate your thoughts on this too! Is this a bug or a limitation on the on-prem 2023 FPS02 stack ?


Here's my abstract entity and behavior setup.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business one
entry.content:
Hin @Saaad 
In addition to @williamwachholz 
I recommend to check our SAP Learning platform 
For your convenience please find a list of SAP Business One related learning material we offer on SAP Learning platform  SAP Business One 
Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Display values from one object in separate columns
entry.content:
You have to create separate variables for the different types and add these to your report instead of the original phone-type.
With these variables you also can filter/select individual types.

entry.title: Deactivation of Classic Profit center accounting
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have migrated to New GL in FY-2024.Following April to March Calendar year.

Both classic PCA and New Profit center accounting is active in the system.

The ask is to deactivate classic PCA and GLT0.

Can anyone throw some light or provide insights in the below query:

1.What will be the impact of deactivating the classic PCA and GLT0?

2.What steps do we need to follow to avoid any disruption?

Any help will be highly appreciated.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Analytics Cloud Connetion to S4 Public Cloud

It seems like, we had to wait some time for the setttings to take effect.

2hrs later we tried again and everything worked fine.

entry.title: Mails regarding failed Taskchains in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi,

I've noticed that we been receiving mails when a task chain is completed. Although when we take a look at the setting that is selected: 

'Send email notification only when the run has completed with an error'. 

Yet we are still receiving emails, once in a while, when status: completed. Rather than only on failure

Seems like a bug.

entry.title: Re: SAP IBP Adjusted Transport Supply is not getting fulf...
entry.content: Hi J. Sounds strange - do you now get also different adjusted transport fulfillments? Probably best to open an according support case, so that all the details can be seen.

entry.title: Eclipse IDE (SAP BW/HANA) Problems In Linux
entry.content:
Hi This has been a problem for a very long time. Since I started using Fedora which is 4 years ago.

I use Eclipse for SAP BW on HANA. Mainly use it to maintain HANA based objects. However, I did find weird issues. Example below.

We maintain composite providers and map to out. When I do this on windows eclipse I see the mapping as below. This is how it suppose to be.

 
 

However on Fedora (Linux) version I dont.

Any ideas to resolve this problem?

Eclipse and Java version

Note: I have tried using all sorts of Java versions, include SAPMachine which is based on Open Java

entry.title: Maintenace plan Automatic Skip FM
entry.content:
Hi Community,

My customer was using standard task list due to this some of maintenance plans calls have no operation so due to this issue when we run RISTRA20 program plan was not scheduled due to No operation error, to avoid this issue we have developed Automatic skip program by using This FM MPLAN_SKIP_CALL. How this program will work is will Schedule Two step job first we will run RISTRA20 2nd step is Automatic Skip program will run once we got error in Ristra 20 step that particular call this automatic program will skip it was skipping successfully,

But the problem when we run this Automatic skip program, Next planned counter reading is not taken as counter confirmation reading, even though we have activated check box for completion requirement. But it is working fine while doing Manul skip in IP10. But when we use This automatic program skipping counter calculation is wrong.

Can you please suggest if you ever encounter this issue and how did you resolve 

Please find below snapshot for better understanding

Best Regards 

Subba Rayudu

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One field mapping with FSM Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Supriya,

only specific default fields from SAP B1 are synchronized to FSM cloud.
If there are fields you'd like to have at FSM, you have to add an influence entry or create an UDF.

UDFs are always synchronized to FSM Cloud.

Best regards,

Alex

entry.title: Re: SAP EarlyWatch Alert Workspace - gain an overview on your system landscape health
entry.content:
Hi @SusanneGlaenzer ,

Good Day to you,

Kindly guide regarding the EWA reports availability in the ME Portal (me.sap.com/apps/ewaworkspace) is functional without the presence of SAP Solution Manager.

In one of the landscapes, i see S4HANA systems are hosted in RISE with SAP environment, for generating the readiness check for cloud-alm, we had used the on-prem SolMan. however, this on-prem SolMan is about to get de-commissioned, by doing so will we loose the EWA report which is currently available in the URL -  me.sap.com/apps/ewaworkspace

Kindly try to share the SAP Note or Blog on above topic, if any.

 

Thanks for the informative above blog.

Hemant Vaswani

entry.title: Re: Integration Suite: Automating Email Alerts for Failed Interfaces in SAP CPI
entry.content: Great approach. Thanks for sharing.
